title: Daycare in your home - Canada.ca
content:
## Daycare in your home
This is were you can find information on how to report your income, claim expenses, and issue receipts for your daycare.
- Reporting your income
- Deducting your business expenses
- Self-employed individual or employee Determine if you are a self-employed individual or an employee
- Issuing receipts for daycare What to include on your receipts
- Your employees Deduct, remit, and report payroll deductions
- Keeping daycare records What you need to keep and for how long
- Payments to the CRA How to pay your income taxes owing, make payment arrangements, and send in instalment payments
- Collecting GST/HST on your daycare services
- Interest and penalties for individuals

## Forms and publications
- Employment Status: Employee or s elf-employed
- Guide T4002 , Self-employed Business, Professional, Commission, Farming, and Fishing Income
- Form T2125 , Statement of Business or Professional Activities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
